result.status_detail: Copilot returned generic 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' — no 차단 warning rendered

notes: W5.0 byte-inert regression — REGRESSION DETECTED. Baseline (W4+W6 #1256-1276) = PASS (차단 warning rendered). This run: prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' was sent successfully (composer + clipboard verified), Copilot replied only with generic error 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' plus 다시 시도 / 피드백 보내기 buttons. No 차단 block warning anywhere in the conversation (no scrollable content). m365_copilot is the KEY WS-dispatch service and the only one touched behaviorally by W5.0 (pinned-id in render_envelope_v3, used by copilot_chat_send). Verdict differs from baseline => non-inert regression to investigate. Logged-in as 최장희, dedicated --new-window, hard reload done before test.
